title: Spelunked Yung's Better Jungle Temples- compat datapack
description: incorporates spelunkery's nephrite into yung's better jungle temples
body:
a simple modpack that makes the temples from yung's better desert temples look much better.
additionally overhauls a few loottables and makes some challenges slightly more warden infested.
on 1.19.2 there's a vanilla bug that causes sculk sensors to act weirdly when spawned through structures, but it shouldn't cause any major problems

Requires Spelunkery, Yung's Better Jungle Temples and their dependencies

Spelunkery: https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery

Better Jungle Temples: https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples
